sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this adventure/puzzle game

special_mechanics.name: Fixed Camera System
special_mechanics.description: Game employs fixed camera angles to frame 3D character movement on 2D background images, affecting player perception of movement

special_mechanics.name: Weight-Based Inventory
special_mechanics.description: Movement and interaction affected by inventory weight management system; items can be picked up, dropped, and retrieved

tier_notes: Tier 2: Alone in the Dark is a survival horror/adventure game (1992) focused on exploration, puzzle-solving, and combat rather than precision platforming. No specific movement physics parameters are documented in available sources. The game uses a fixed camera angle system and 3D character models on 2D backgrounds. Precise jump mechanics, gravity values, and sub-pixel systems are not documented in standard gaming references.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Alone in the Dark (1992 video game)
